reason: Verify architecture, commit, and product constraints.
Verify new command/result/error contract stays coarse-grained.
Verify parse/import contract fits existing registry persistence boundary.
Verify errors are structured and user-visible.
Verify parser and storage behavior belong in Rust core.
Verify imported raw ssh strings are not runtime source of truth.
Verify imported rules persist without credential material.
Verify native UI and Chinese-first copy.
Verify sheet flow and registry layout remain consistent.
Verify Swift does not parse SSH commands.
Verify first import slice handles one-line command and multiple -L forwards.
Verify provider target handling remains narrow and non-secret.
